title: The Route to Big Mom’s Territory
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Nami, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Reiju, Unknown person #8 as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is beyond bad... Hang in there, Luffy! Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't lose to some fish poison! You're the man that's gonna be the pirate King!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy! Don't Dize~!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PLEASE! WE'RE SIMPLY ASKING FOR SOME ANTI- DOTE!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've already used all ours up! And none of them appear to have had any effect...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you really are Sanji's little brother, please! Please help us save Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: sucks to be you guys... I'm not the type of man that goes around saving people.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How about you try stealing the antidote from me? Like a pirate would...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's with this schmuck?! He might look like Sanji, but they're totally different!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He does have that lecherous streak but outside of that, yeah...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He's not even the least bit nice!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we must resort to blows, just give me the word.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yonji.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Quit being a stingy idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: GAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Master Yonji!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who is it now?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: HACK...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Miss Reige!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: No,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: A Tress- Passer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hello... and sorry about that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My little brother lacks even the barest shred of humanity.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He's rotten to the core.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Little brother?! So you're that guy's older sister?! And your eyebrows are all curly too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So pretty! :)

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: GERMA 66 (Poison Pink) REIGE VINSMOKE

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Reige!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: NOTE: We’re

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn you! How dare you shame me like that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Silence!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're doing a fine enough job sharing yourself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Uh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it just me or is he floating ?!

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: The germa...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Are a technology- calmly advanced fighting squad.

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: That's exactly why Mama's after their powers!

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Pekoms... The Vinsmoke family...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that the name of a line of Royals?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A clan that, long ago, ruled all of North Blue with an iron fist!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: exchange of the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Whaaa?! are they really that infamous?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed. In a certain age, their name itself was synonymous with evil.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's why that comic features them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OH? Mr. Skeleton, you sure are well versed on your history.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been alive for a long time, I guess... Although I did die some- where along the way...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you're a bit mistaken. This is no story of the past. We are still Royals.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 51 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
